data.title: Lowe’s leans on AI and ecommerce to drive 2026 growth
data.description: President and CEO Marvin Ellison said Lowe’s has embedded generative AI tools across customer-facing and internal digital workflows.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How to understand agentic commerce levels currently in use
data.description: Agentic commerce and agentic AI are still evolving, with levels of capability varying across agents and platforms.

data.title: Farmers file appeal alleging big agriculture companies coordinated boycott of online sellers
data.description: The farmers claim the defendants acted collectively to limit online competition as ecommerce platforms began offering more transparent pricing.

data.title: Economist: AI spending boom reshaping U.S. economy
data.description: The message to B2B ecommerce executives was clear: AI is creating a structural shift in how corporations allocate resources and how the economy grows.

data.title: Target to launch app in OpenAI's ChatGPT
data.description: Target said it will offer "a complete shopping experience" through its ChatGPT app. The app will allow consumers to purchase multiple items in a single transaction, shop for fresh food and select omnichannel fulfillment options including drive up and pick up.
